summary: Iteration 68: Narrow Ridge Suggest Endpoint Tests - 21/21 tests PASSED (100%). Verified all 12 features requested: GET /api/implant-library/suggest returns narrow_options (diameter <=3.5mm) when bone_width<6, narrow_ridge_evaluation with classification and drilling_protocol_label when bone_type provided, narrow_ridge_warning when system has no narrow options, NO narrow_options when bone_width>=6, blocked=true when bone_width<3mm. POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto returns narrow_ridge_evaluation and narrow_ridge_blocked correctly. 'Narrow Ridge' procedure option works in both endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/implant-library/suggest correctly returns narrow_options (array of implants with diameter <=3.5mm) when bone_width < 6mm
narrow_ridge_evaluation correctly includes classification, classification_label, severity, and recommendation.protocols array
bone_type query parameter correctly maps to drilling protocols: D1=full_drilling, D2=slight_undersizing, D3=undersized_drilling, D4=osteotome_or_minimal_drilling
drilling_protocol_label is correctly included in recommendation when bone_type is provided
narrow_ridge_warning correctly returned when selected system has no narrow diameter implants (e.g., Bredent Copa Sky)
POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto correctly returns narrow_ridge_blocked=true with empty recommended_systems when bone_width < 3mm
moderate_narrow classification (3-4.5mm) correctly includes protocols array: ['undersized_drilling', 'ridge_expansion', 'split_crest']
Boundary conditions correctly handled: 6mm = no narrow_options, 5.99mm = has narrow_options
'Narrow Ridge' procedure option correctly appears in procedure-options endpoint with D1-D4 bone type compatibility
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing implant library data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Narrow Ridge Suggest Endpoint fully tested in iteration 68. All 12 requested features verified working. GET /api/implant-library/suggest returns narrow_options (implants with diameter <=3.5mm), narrow_ridge_evaluation with classification/drilling_protocol_label, and narrow_ridge_warning when bone_width<6. POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto returns narrow_ridge_blocked=true when bone_width<3mm. 'Narrow Ridge' procedure option works correctly. Systems tested: Osstem TS III (has narrow options: 3.0, 3.5mm), Bredent Copa Sky (no narrow options, returns warning), Osstem MS (has narrow options).

feature_8_narrow_ridge_procedure_works.result: PASS - 'Narrow Ridge' as procedure works correctly with D2 and D3 bone types

feature_9_narrow_ridge_in_procedures_lis.result: PASS - 'Narrow Ridge' appears in procedures list with allowedBone=['D1','D2','D3','D4']
